column2: Verify that an admin can add a comment on the team detail page
column3:
1. Login to admin.fctf.site as an admin.
2. Open the detail page of a team.
3. Enter a comment into the comment input.
4. Submit the comment.
5. Review the team detail page.
column4:
- The comment is added successfully.
- The new comment appears on the team detail page.
- The page remains accessible after submission.
- The saved comment content matches the submitted text.
column5:
- Admin is logged in to admin.fctf.site.
- At least 1 team detail page is accessible.
- The comment input is available on the page.
